name: Rich Sport Public Company Limited
summary: Rich Sport Public Company Limited manufactures and sells sneakers and apparel products in Thailand and internationally. Its products include sneakers for men, women, and kids; and tees, pants, shorts, leggings, and jackets for men and women, as well as accessories, such as bags, caps, hats, socks, and laces. The company offers its products primarily under the All Star, Cons, and Jack Purcell names. Rich Sport Public Company Limited was founded in 1908 and is based in Bangkok, Thailand.
